title: Legacy / phase-taxonomy result file
description: Floor schema for historical phase-taxonomy artifacts (transformer_observe.json, *_sae-comparison.json, *_bottleneck-scaling.json, *_exdim-1000.json, *_exdim-sweep.json). These predate the v3+ scope. Required only: a well-formed provenance block. Top-level field shapes vary by phase artifact and are not constrained here.

provenance.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.
